title: Mobs' Equipment Will Be Damaged│生物的裝備會損壞
description: When mobs use equipment, the durability of the equipment will also be reduced.│當生物使用裝備時，裝備的耐久度同樣會降低。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
- Equipment worn by mobs loses durability just like equipment worn by players. Currently applies to any melee weapon, bow, and trident.│生物身上的裝備和玩家身上的裝備一樣會損失耐久。目前適用於任何近戰武器、弓、三叉戟。
- Currently due to technical issues, the equipment on mobs does not lose durability.│目前因為技術問題，生物身上的裝備並不會損失耐久。
- This data pack is recommended to be used in conjunction with [Loot Equipment](https://modrinth.com/datapack/loot-equipment). This will prevent the durability of equipment dropped by mobs from changing randomly. The durability of the equipment will be the same as the durability consumed by the mob.│此資料包建議配合[掠奪裝備](https://modrinth.com/datapack/loot-equipment)一起使用，可以讓生物掉落的裝備耐久度不會隨機變動，生物消耗了裝備多少耐久度，掉落後就會是多少耐久度。
